title: Restore missing admin link/button in navigation

requirements.summary: Add a visible admin link/button to the Layout component so users can navigate to the /admin route from any page
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Admin' link or button is visible in the Layout (header or footer) on every page of the app.
Clicking the Admin link navigates to the /admin route.
The link/button styling matches the existing Cleanio brand design (deep charcoal + electric orange palette).
The admin link is present on both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts.

file_operations.description: Add an Admin navigation link to both the desktop header navigation and the mobile hamburger menu. The link should navigate to '/admin' and be styled consistently with the existing Cleanio brand design system (deep charcoal + electric orange). Also add an Admin link to the footer section. Ensure the link appears on all pages and is accessible from both desktop and mobile layouts.
